name: spreadx-matrix
description: Operate a SpreadX account from Codex — balance, orders, follow & like/retweet/comment plans, and tracking your plans — via the spreadx MCP server, with a dry-run→confirm safety protocol.

interface.shortDescription: Operate a SpreadX account: balance, orders, follow, like, plans
interface.longDescription: Check your SpreadX balance and orders, create follow / like-retweet-comment growth plans, and list/track your plans' progress, through the spreadx MCP server. Every write is previewed (dry-run) and confirmed before it runs.
